calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Nov-01-2017 is admitted to probate. Carmen Yuen is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for Oct-13-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-09-2024 Continued To Oct-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
